steps.title: Identify the missing table value
steps.content: The value $a$ is the y-value when $x=3$. Since the equation is given, the fastest method is direct substitution.

steps.title: Use the equation instead of estimating
steps.content: The table is generated by the exact equation, so evaluating the formula at the missing $x$-value is more reliable than trying to infer the pattern from nearby entries.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The missing table value is $37$, which matches B.
